query:
SELECT id, title, realname, '/covers_small/' || image_hash || '.webp' as "image_path!", console, category, region, release_year, serial, languages, "versions_count!" FROM (
                 SELECT DISTINCT ON (console, title) id, title, realname, image_hash, console, category, region, release_year, serial, languages,
                 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM roms r2 WHERE r2.title = roms.title AND r2.console = roms.console) as "versions_count!"
                 FROM roms
                 WHERE category = $1
                 ORDER BY console, title, region NULLS LAST
             ) sub
             ORDER BY title ASC
             LIMIT 50
